betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Tiered Backpack Upgrades§f

§aStep up your storage game with higher tiers and specialty paths!§f
Now that you have a Basic Backpack, it is time to step up your storage game with higher tiers. Each tier offers two specialty paths — §dStorage§f (maximizes inventory size) or §dUpgrade§f (maximizes upgrade points for functional modules).

§6Backpack Progression & Specialties§f:
§b• Iron Backpack§f (Tier 1): Base of §e7 upgrade points§f.
§b- Storage Specialty§f: §e36 slots§f and §e7 upgrade points§f.
§b- Upgrade Specialty§f: §e27 slots§f and §e12 upgrade points§f (+5 bonus).
§b• Gold Backpack§f (Tier 2): Base of §e12 upgrade points§f.
§b- Storage Specialty§f: §e45 slots§f and §e12 upgrade points§f.
§b- Upgrade Specialty§f: §e36 slots§f and §e17 upgrade points§f (+5 bonus).
§b• Diamond Backpack§f (Tier 3): Base of §e18 upgrade points§f.
§b- Storage Specialty§f: §e54 slots§f (maximum) and §e18 upgrade points§f.
§b- Upgrade Specialty§f: §e45 slots§f and §e23 upgrade points§f (maximum upgrade capacity, +5 bonus).

§6Upgrade Recipe Pattern§f:
When upgrading to higher tiers, §dStorage§f focus uses a §bChest§f in the top-center recipe slot. §dUpgrade§f focus uses a §bBlank Upgrade§f in the top-center slot.
